- Hook in first 2 seconds
- Shot list with camera moves
- Product visibility in every key shot
- Text-safe zones and CTA ending
- Channel export notes for reels/shorts`;
const base = clean(prompt) || "Create a short video plan.";

return `${base}

- Scene-by-scene narration
- German-friendly pronunciation notes
- Timing markers for each scene
- CTA close with compliant brand tone`;
`${contextPrompt}\n\nCampaign pack outputs: image hero, video short, voiceover script, channel cutdowns, and publishing-ready metadata.`
